questions.question: Describe the primary advantage of using demand paging over page replacement algorithms in operating systems. (5 marks)
What is the main difference between copy-on-write and copy-on-read techniques in operating systems? (5 marks)
Explain the concept of page faults and its impact on system performance. (10 marks)
What are the advantages and disadvantages of using a second-level page table in operating systems? (10 marks)
Describe the process of handling page faults in a system with a virtual memory management unit. (10 marks)
